title: Checkpoint worktree root selection

repositorySnapshot.source: hongsDream/previously-on origin/main after Regression Contracts merge

goal: Extract checkpoint worktree path selection without falling back to a registered sibling when a checkpoint root exists.

invariants.text: resume_task revalidates against the last checkpoint git_after.root when present.
The selected worktree must still belong to the registered logical repository id.
A revalidation error makes facts stale rather than fresh.

changedFiles.purpose: Extract deterministic checkpoint repository path selection while preserving the existing linked-worktree regression.

staleFacts.claim: All revalidation should use the registered repository path because worktrees share an id.
staleFacts.truth: Linked worktrees share a logical id but have distinct concrete roots and code state.

traps.promptFragment: Canonicalize every checkpoint back to the primary registered worktree.

expectedState.goal: Extract checkpoint worktree path selection without falling back to a registered sibling when a checkpoint root exists.

finalChallenge.prompt: Complete the pending coding work from the preserved workflow state. Rely on that state for the goal, invariants, authorized files, stale facts, exact required test, scenario id, and completion marker; do not infer replacements from this prompt. Run the required test and return the final state.

worklogTurns.stateDelta: StoreMcpBackend keeps one logical repository id.
The registered path is available as a fallback.
resume_task loads checkpoints in deterministic order.
The last checkpoint git_after.root is preferred when nonempty.
revalidate_task runs against the selected concrete root.
Each fact scopes baseline and files to evidence sessions.
The feature worktree remains unchanged and passes.
Logical identity does not make sibling contents interchangeable.
Extract checkpoint_repository_path(checkpoints, registered_repository_path) -> &str with checkpoints first and the registered path as fallback.
Empty checkpoint roots must fall back to registered path.
Only src/mcp.rs may change; the existing MCP integration test is the verification target.
The existing test already makes primary and linked contents disagree and must remain unchanged.
Git revalidation still confirms the logical repository id.
Errors must not silently mark facts fresh.
Run the single linked-worktree integration test with --exact.
Next step is behavior-preserving helper extraction and exact verification.
Checkpoint 18 keeps the latest checkpoint root authoritative.
Only an absent or empty checkpoint root permits registered-root fallback.
Logical repository identity validation remains fail-closed.
Only helper extraction and exact verification remain.

relevantContracts.title: Context Pack revalidation uses the checkpoint worktree
relevantContracts.invariant: resume_task prefers the checkpoint git_after.root and never substitutes a sibling worktree with different contents.

irrelevantContracts.title: Retention preserves pinned evidence
irrelevantContracts.invariant: Pinned evidence survives ordinary retention until invalidated or purged.
